summary: Iteration 88 - Professional Grade Scheduling for Bookings Manager. All requested features verified: Step-Based Calendar UX (Select Date → Select Time), Duration NumericStepper, Crew split-payment logic with Add Crew Members UI, Price Per Additional Surfer in Edit Rates modal. Backend APIs working correctly. Frontend UI fully functional.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - Surfer bookings endpoint not found (non-blocking for photographer features)

issues: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

bookings_manager_page_loads.details: Page loads at /photographer/bookings via Photo Tools > Bookings Manager sidebar navigation

create_session_button.details: Create Session button found with data-testid='create-session-btn', opens step-based calendar modal

step1_location_input.details: Location input found with data-testid='booking-location-input', placeholder 'e.g., Pipeline, North Shore'

step1_calendar_date_selection.details: Calendar component (react-day-picker) displays correctly, past dates disabled, selecting date transitions to Step 2

step1_duration_numeric_stepper.details: Session Duration NumericStepper with +/- buttons works, shows hours suffix, calculates total price dynamically

step1_to_step2_transition.details: Clicking date auto-transitions to Step 2, 'Next: Select Time' button also available

step2_time_slot_grid.details: Time slot grid displays 30 slots (5:00 AM to 7:00 PM in 30-min intervals) with data-testid='time-slot-{time}'

step2_allow_crew_splitting_toggle.details: Allow Crew Splitting toggle found with description 'Let surfers invite friends to split costs'

step2_add_crew_members_section.details: Add Crew Members section appears when Friends Only mode selected, has email/username input and + button

step2_split_mode_options.details: Friends Only and Open Nearby split mode options displayed as selectable cards

edit_rates_modal.details: Edit Rates button found with data-testid='edit-booking-pricing-btn', opens Booking Rates modal

edit_rates_session_pricing.details: Session Pricing section with Hourly Rate ($75/hr) and Minimum Hours (1 hr) NumericSteppers

edit_rates_photo_resolution_pricing.details: Photo Resolution Pricing section with Web-Res ($3), Standard ($5), High-Res ($10) NumericSteppers

edit_rates_photos_included.details: Photos Included in Buy-In section with Full Gallery Access toggle and photos count stepper (3)

edit_rates_crew_split_pricing.details: Crew Split Pricing section found with formula explanation and Price Per Additional Surfer stepper ($15)

edit_rates_price_per_additional_surfer.details: Price Per Additional Surfer NumericStepper found showing $15, with description 'Added to base price for each additional crew member'

api_booked_slots.details: GET /api/photographer/{id}/booked-slots returns 200 with array of booked slots for date

critical_code_review_comments: Step-based calendar UX implemented correctly with 2-step flow (Date → Time)
NumericStepper component used consistently for all pricing/duration inputs
Crew split pricing formula displayed: Base Session Price + (Per Surfer × Additional Crew)
Time slots generated from 5 AM to 7 PM in 30-minute intervals as specified
Calendar uses react-day-picker via shadcn/ui Calendar component
Add Crew Members section only shows when 'Friends Only' split mode is selected
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test photographer account
context_for_next_testing_agent: Professional Grade Scheduling features fully implemented and tested. Bookings Manager accessible via Photo Tools > Bookings Manager. Create Session modal uses 2-step flow. Edit Rates modal has Crew Split Pricing section with Price Per Additional Surfer stepper. Backend APIs for pricing and booked-slots working correctly.
